'''yangadha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ngwee|ngwee]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-ng-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ngwee|ngwee]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| yangadha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yængædhæth|yængædhæth]] || [[word:yængædhæj|yængædhæj]] || [[word:yængædhæsh|yængædhæsh]] || [[word:yængædhæ|yængædhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yangangadhath|yangangadhath]] || [[word:yangangadhaj|yangangadhaj]] || [[word:yangangadhash|yangangadhash]] || [[word:yangangadha|yangangadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yangadhath|yangadhath]] || [[word:yangadhaj|yangadhaj]] || [[word:yangadhash|yangadhash]] || [[word:yangadha|yangadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yangafdhath|yangafdhath]] || [[word:yangafdhaj|yangafdhaj]] || [[word:yangafdhash|yangafdhash]] || [[word:yangafdhaf|yangafdhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yangadhatha|yangadhatha]] || [[word:yangadhaja|yangadhaja]] || [[word:yangadhasha|yangadhasha]] || [[word:yangadhaka|yangadhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yangadhath|yangadhath]] || [[word:yangadhaj|yangadhaj]] || [[word:yangadhash|yangadhash]] || [[word:yangadha|yangadha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yangadhathal|yangadhathal]] || [[word:yangadhajal|yangadhajal]] || [[word:yangadhashal|yangadhashal]] || [[word:yangadhakal|yangadhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yangadhathatha|yangadhathatha]] || [[word:yangadhajaja|yangadhajaja]] || [[word:yangadhashasha|yangadhashasha]] || [[word:yangadhaka|yangadhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yangadhathan|yangadhathan]] || [[word:yangadhajan|yangadhajan]] || [[word:yangadhashan|yangadhashan]] || [[word:yangadhakan|yangadhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yangadhathaoro|yangadhathaoro]] || [[word:yangadhajaoro|yangadhajaoro]] || [[word:yangadhashaoro|yangadhashaoro]] || [[word:yangadhakaoro|yangadhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
